title: Create show-ideas
description: Read memory/notes.jsonl (only is_idea=true) and return a full LLM-clustered report (themes, links, priorities, authors, open Qs) for a given period.

findings.message: Skill text references hidden prompt layers

goal: Produce a full, semantically-clustered, considered digest of collected ideas by delegating grouping, prioritisation, and synthesis to MiniMax-M3.
evidence: Tested end-to-end on 5 real + synthetic ideas. /info output is a Russian Markdown report with theme clusters, links between ideas, top-3 priorities, author summary, and open questions. /info today|week|month|all variants work. bot @Goldenteam239bot is live.
